description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with build and deploy stages (and implicit test dependencies). In the build stage add the .build:android template using the kazade/android-sdk image, a Gradle cache keyed on gradle-wrapper.properties, artifacts of ${TARGET}/${BUILD_TYPE}/simulant and tests, and a script that cd's into gradle, exports ABI_FILTERS=${ABI}, runs ./gradlew --parallel --build-cache --gradle-user-home .gradle/ ${BUILD_JOB}, then moves the built AAR to the target directory; also add the .build:macos-m1-gcc template using the macos-14-xcode-15 image with a before_script installing brew packages glfw, sdl2, python, and a script that builds debug and release with cmake and make, publishing the resulting binaries as artifacts. Define concrete build jobs extending these templates: build:android-all-clang:debug and :release (setting ABI, BUILD_JOB, BUILD_TYPE, TARGET), build:dreamcast-sh4-gcc, build:evercade-armv7-gcc, build:linux-x64-clang (with dnf installing clang, cmake, make, SDL2, OpenAL, etc.), build:linux-x64-gcc, build:linux-x64-gcc11, build:psp-mips-gcc:debug and :release (using kazade/psp-sdk and psp-cmake), build:raspberrypi-armv7-gcc, build:windows-x64-mingw:debug and :release (using a custom mingw image, running mingw64-cmake, make, and copying required DLLs), and a code_quality job that uploads gl-code-quality-report.json. In the deploy stage add the .deploy:deploy template using $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:deploy, restricted to master/main/next/tags, with a script that creates an upload directory, copies library files (using LIB_EXT), rsyncs header files, zips the package, configures gsutil with GCS_ACCESS_KEY and GCS_SECRET, uploads the zip to a GCS bucket and makes it publicly readable; then create deploy jobs deploy:android-all-clang, deploy:assets, deploy:dreamcast-sh4-gcc, deploy:evercade-armv7-gcc, deploy:linux-x64-gcc, deploy:linux-x64-gcc11, deploy:psp-mips-gcc, and deploy:raspberrypi-armv7-gcc that extend .deploy:deploy, set appropriate LIB_EXT and TARGET variables, and depend on their respective build (and test) jobs.
